package rulecoverage

func PositiveCrc64ChecksumInLoop() string {
    ruleID := "crc64_checksum_in_loop"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "`crc64.Checksum(...)` inside loops."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
